item.title: Oil prices soar and stock prices fall as US-Israel war with Iran rattles markets
item.description: The U.S. and Israeli attacks on Iran have sent a chill through world markets, with U.S. futures falling more than 1%

item.title: Oil prices rise sharply after attacks in Middle East disrupt global energy supply
item.description: Oil prices have jumped as U.S. and Israeli attacks on Iran and retaliatory strikes against Israel and U.S. military installations around the Gulf ripp...

item.title: Cyprus confirms a drone attack targeted a British base on the island and caused damage
item.description: Cyprus confirms a drone attack targeted a British base on the island and caused damage

item.title: Iraqi Shiite militia claims drone attack targeting US forces at airport in Iraq's capital
item.description: Iraqi Shiite militia claims drone attack targeting US forces at airport in Iraq's capital

item.title: As China's economy slows, some are snapping up cheap apartments to 'retire' early
item.description: As China’s property market craters and youth unemployment rises, burned-out young professionals are fleeing megacities for ultracheap housing in remot...
